content:
# Unayzah Formation

**Summary**: A clastic reservoir formation containing sandstones and siltstones.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[1997-al-marhoun|Al-Marhoun, 1997]] used unayzah-formation as the primary target for property estimation.

- [[2002-siddiqui|Siddiqui, 2002]] studied the unayzah-formation to evaluate its reservoir quality and depositional environment.

- [[2011-al-masrahy|AL-MASRAHY, 2011]] studied the Unayzah-A formation to characterize its reservoir properties.

- [[2011-alburaikan|AlBuraikan, 2011]] Referenced in this thesis.

- [[2016-hassan|Hassan, 2016]] studied the Unayzah-C and Unayzah-A members of the Unayzah Formation.

- [[2016-houssain|Houssain, 2016]] studied the Unayzah formation as the primary target reservoir.

- [[2020-almumtin|Almumtin, 2020]] studied the unayzah-formation as a primary reservoir.

- [[2020-gbiyanju|Gbiyanju, 2020]] investigated the Unayzah formation as a key source of light crude and sweet gas.

## Depositional Environment

- [[1997-al-marhoun|Al-Marhoun, 1997]] Continental (fluvial, alluvial fan, playa)

- [[2002-siddiqui|Siddiqui, 2002]] studied the unayzah-formation to evaluate its reservoir quality and depositional environment.

- [[2011-al-masrahy|AL-MASRAHY, 2011]] studied the Unayzah-A formation to characterize its reservoir properties.

- [[2011-alburaikan|AlBuraikan, 2011]] Referenced in this thesis.

- [[2016-hassan|Hassan, 2016]] studied the Unayzah-C and Unayzah-A members of the Unayzah Formation.

- [[2016-houssain|Houssain, 2016]] studied the Unayzah formation as the primary target reservoir.

- [[2020-almumtin|Almumtin, 2020]] studied the unayzah-formation as a primary reservoir.

- [[2020-gbiyanju|Gbiyanju, 2020]] investigated the Unayzah formation as a key source of light crude and sweet gas.

## Reservoir Properties



## Diagenetic History



## Key Findings Across Sources

- The Unayzah Formation contains both high-quality sands (Unayzah-A) and lower quality siltstones. ([[1997-al-marhoun|Al-Marhoun, 1997, p. 39]])

- The formation contains sandstones, shale, and siltstone with a variety of diagenetic features. ([[2002-siddiqui|Siddiqui, 2002, p. 23]])

- The Unayzah-A is divided into several facies including dunes, interdunes, sand sheets, and playa lakes. ([[2011-al-masrahy|AL-MASRAHY, 2011, p. 26]])

- Referenced in this thesis. ([[2011-alburaikan|AlBuraikan, 2011]])

- The Unayzah-C member is a heterogeneous glacial deposit, while the Unayzah-A member consists of eolian dune sandstones. ([[2016-hassan|Hassan, 2016, p. 32]])

- The Unayzah-a member is highly heterogeneous and divided into two stratal units (Zone A and Zone B). ([[2016-houssain|Houssain, 2016, p. 21]])

- The formation contains sand-rich intervals with varying mineralogy and porosity. ([[2020-almumtin|Almumtin, 2020, p. 26]])

- The formation is characterized by complex continental clastic deposits including aeolian, fluvial, and alluvial fan facies. ([[2020-gbiyanju|Gbiyanju, 2020, p. 45]])
